description_long: This is a low-profile athletic shoe with a predominantly white and green color scheme, accented by black and silver details. The upper features green stripes and a white heel, with a visible Adidas logo on the tongue and a shield-shaped emblem on the heel. The shoe appears to be made of synthetic leather and textile materials, with a rubber sole that is thin and streamlined for agility. The side view reveals a number '91' printed near the heel, adding a sporty, personalized touch. The shoe shows signs of wear, particularly on the toe and sides, with some scuffing and discoloration visible.
description: A white, green, and black Adidas athletic shoe with visible logos, green stripes, and signs of wear, including scuffing and discoloration.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the white heel, shield-shaped emblem, and part of the green side stripes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the green stripes, white upper, and streamlined black sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the Adidas logo on the tongue, black toe area, and visible wear on the upper.
description_view_3: Right side view with green stripes, white upper, and the number '91' printed near the heel.
attribute_logo: Adidas trefoil logo on the tongue (white on black), shield-shaped emblem on the heel (black on white), and '91' in a white circle on the right side near the heel.
